data.title: bn-p7rx: Add OpenTelemetry tracing with TRACEPARENT propagation
data.description: Adds W3C TRACEPARENT context propagation to botbus. Changes: new telemetry.rs module (copied/adapted from botbox), Cargo.toml deps (tracing, otel stack feature-gated), telemetry::init() in main, #[instrument] on key ops, eprintln replaced with tracing::warn, TRACEPARENT propagated to hook-spawned processes. Clippy + fmt clean. risk:medium.
